---
name: 💡 Improvement or Optimization Proposal
about: Suggest ideas to optimize performance.
title: "[ENHANCEMENT] Title of the proposal"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

### ⚡ What does the enhancement consist of?

Describe your idea clearly (e.g., optimizing scroll events to avoid DOM lag, refactoring heavy CSS layouts, etc.).

### 🛠️ Hardware & Performance Impact

How does this change benefit low-spec smart feature phones (256MB/512MB RAM)?

### 📝 Additional Details

Any other context, mockups fitting the standard resolution (240x320), or code snippets you want to share.
